title: Resume an onboarding draft after signing in
description: Verifies a guest can reach the resume stage, sign in, and continue the saved onboarding draft without losing progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai?resume=1
Enter valid credentials and submit the sign-in form
Continue the restored onboarding draft
Verify the onboarding draft is restored
Verify the user can continue setup from the saved state

title: Start a story from quick onboarding
description: Verifies a guest can complete the quick story setup, choose one premise, and enter the story reading screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Choose the quick start mode
Answer each guided story question
Continue to the premise review
Select one premise proposal
Start the story
Verify the story reading screen is displayed
Verify a selected premise is reflected in the story setup

title: Start a story from a custom idea
description: Verifies a guest can enter a free-form story idea, generate proposals, choose one, and start the story.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Choose the custom idea mode
Enter a free-form story idea
Submit the idea
Select one premise proposal
Start the story
Verify the story reading screen is displayed
Verify the generated premise proposals are replaced by the chosen premise

title: Resume a guest draft after signing in
description: A guest who returns to a saved onboarding draft can sign in and continue the story setup without losing progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai?resume=1
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the saved story setup is restored
Verify the onboarding flow continues from the draft

title: Keep draft progress after signing in
description: A guest can return to the resume flow after login and see the draft content they had already started.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai?resume=1
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the draft answers remain available after sign-in
Verify the user can continue the setup flow

title: Complete the full story planning flow
description: Verifies a reader can work through the detailed multi-stage story planner and continue setup at the end.

steps.description: Navigate to /brainstorm
Complete each story planning stage in sequence
Continue past the final planning stage
Verify the completed planning summary is displayed
Verify the story setup can continue from the wizard

title: Open the full planning wizard from onboarding
description: Verifies a reader can choose full mode from the onboarding entry and reach the detailed planning wizard.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Choose the full mode
Verify the full planning wizard is displayed
Verify the user is on the story planning flow

title: Restore a saved draft at the resume stage
description: A user who reaches the resume-lock stage can authenticate and return to the same onboarding session.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai?resume=1
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the saved onboarding session is restored
Verify the user stays on the story setup journey

title: Use a custom answer during quick start
description: Verifies a reader can replace one guided quick-start answer with their own text and continue through story setup successfully.
category: Custom Answer Entry in Quick Start

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Choose the quick start mode
Open one guided question
Choose to write a custom answer
Enter a custom answer in the answer field
Save the answer
Continue through the remaining questions
Verify the custom answer is accepted and the setup can continue
Verify premise proposals are available after completing the quiz

title: Continue setup after login from a guest resume prompt
description: Signing in from a guest resume prompt returns the user to the in-progress story creation path.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai?resume=1
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the pending story draft is restored
Verify the story creation flow remains active

title: Return to the saved onboarding draft after authentication
description: A signed-in reader can resume the preserved setup state and keep moving toward story creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai?resume=1
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the saved draft content is visible again
Verify the next step in onboarding is available

title: Use the default answer during quick start
description: Verifies a reader can keep the suggested quick-start answer and continue to story proposal review without custom entry.
category: Custom Answer Entry in Quick Start

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Choose the quick start mode
Open one guided question
Choose the default suggested answer
Continue through the remaining questions
Review the premise proposals
Verify premise proposals are displayed
Verify the quick-start flow continues without requiring custom text entry

title: Start story creation from the landing page
description: A visitor can begin story onboarding from the landing page and reach the story setup entry screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to begin creating a story
Verify the story onboarding entry screen is displayed
Verify the user can choose a story creation mode

title: Save a taste profile and keep the choices
description: Verifies a reader can complete the taste profile form, save preferences, and see that the profile is stored.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding/selera
Answer the taste profile questions
Save the profile
Verify a saved profile confirmation is visible
Verify the completed taste profile is retained

title: Open the home shell from the landing page
description: A visitor can start on the landing page and choose to enter the main home area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the home area
Verify the home shell is displayed
Verify the library area is available

title: Move from landing to the story setup entry
description: A visitor can use the landing page to reach the story creation entry point without leaving the app flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to begin creating a story
Verify the story setup entry is shown
Verify the onboarding flow is ready to continue

title: Reach the home shell from the landing page
description: Verifies a visitor can use the landing page navigation to reach the home shell browsing experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the home shell from the landing page
Verify the home shell is displayed
Verify the library and explore areas are available

title: Browse the library area in the home shell
description: A user can open the home shell and view the library section for browsing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /beranda
Verify the home shell is displayed
Verify the library section is visible

title: Explore content from the home shell
description: A user can access the home shell and browse the explore area as part of the main app experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /beranda
Verify the home shell is displayed
Verify the explore area is visible

title: Skip taste profile setup for now
description: Verifies a reader can leave taste profile onboarding without saving preferences.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding/selera
Open the taste profile flow
Choose to skip for now
Verify the user leaves the profile setup flow
Verify no saved profile is created

title: Save a partial taste profile
description: Verifies a reader can save a partially completed taste profile when the flow allows incomplete preferences.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding/selera
Answer some of the taste profile questions
Save the profile
Verify a partial profile save confirmation is visible
Verify the saved preferences are available for later use
